nodes.name: Daily 7am IST (Mon–Fri)
nodes.notes: Fires at 01:30 UTC = 07:00 IST every weekday

nodes.name: RSS: ICAI Announcements
nodes.notes: ICAI official news feed. Swap URL if feed changes.

nodes.name: Claude: Rank Top Ideas
nodes.notes: Set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in n8n environment variables

nodes.name: Process Each Idea (Loop)
nodes.notes: Processes one idea at a time. Output 0 = current idea, Output 1 = all done

nodes.name: Generate Branded Image (HCTI)
nodes.notes: Uses htmlcsstoimage.com (HCTI) API. Add 'hcti-basic-auth' credential with your user_id as username and api_key as password. Free tier: 50 images/month. OR replace this node with any image gen service.

nodes.name: Supabase: Store Draft
nodes.notes: Set SUPABASE_URL and SUPABASE_SERVICE_KEY in n8n environment variables

nodes.name: Resend: Notify You for Approval
nodes.notes: Fires once after ALL ideas are processed (connected from Split Done output). Set RESEND_API_KEY env var.
